title: Server Survival: Swap Tower
objective: Keep the server tower online for a 3-minute traffic rush by matching incoming gate colors, surviving overload events, and building the highest uptime score before total meltdown.

controls.outcome: Shift the server tower between the three lanes.
Cycle the tower between red, blue, and yellow service modes to match the next gate.

controls.input: Tap and hold during a spike alarm
controls.outcome: Deploy a temporary sidecar clone into an adjacent lane for a few seconds, catching one lane automatically while you keep
Return to single-tower control and rebuild your combo before the next surge.

steps: Match the tower's color to the next request gate in its lane before contact.
Each correct match clears traffic, raises combo, and slightly increases game speed.
A wrong color or wrong lane lets bad traffic through and removes one stability segment.
Every few seconds a traffic spike marks two lanes at once; choose whether to stay mobile or hold to autoscale a temporary clone into a
Survive until all stability segments are gone or the 3-minute rush ends.
scoring: Score rises from each matched gate, with a combo multiplier for consecutive perfect absorbs. Autoscale catches score less than manual catches, so safe play lowers leaderboard potential.
tips: Read two gates ahead; lane choice matters as much as color choice.
Use autoscale only on double-lane spike waves, because it protects survival but weakens combo gain.
Audio pings can cue color families and overload alarms, making the game playable offline without constant visual focus.
After a hit, prioritize easy matches to rebuild multiplier before the next surge set.

trendContext.title: server-survival Tower defense game that teaches cloud architecture. Build infrastructure, survive traffic, learn scaling.
